scripts.build:browsers: npm run build && node scripts/package-browser.mjs chrome && node scripts/package-browser.mjs brave && node scripts/package-browser.mjs firefox
scripts.build:chromium: npm run build && node scripts/package-browser.mjs chromium
scripts.build:chrome: npm run build && node scripts/package-browser.mjs chrome
scripts.build:brave: npm run build && node scripts/package-browser.mjs brave
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build && node scripts/package-browser.mjs firefox
scripts.zip:chromium: npm run build:chromium && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs chromium
scripts.zip:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs chrome
scripts.zip:brave: npm run build:brave && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs brave
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs firefox
scripts.zip:browsers: npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:brave && npm run zip:firefox
scripts.release:amo: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs firefox Metayoshi-firefox-amo.zip
scripts.release:all: npm run build:browsers && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs chrome Metayoshi-chrome-store.zip && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs brave Metayoshi-brave-store.zip && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs firefox Metayoshi-firefox-amo.zip
scripts.release:browsers: npm run build:browsers && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs chrome && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs brave && node scripts/zip-browser.mjs firefox
